author: Charisma on Command
name: Conversational Threading
summary: Never run out of things to say by identifying multiple threads in any topic and following them naturally.
steps: Listen for 3 threads in what they said

author: Vinh Giang
name: Match, Mirror, and Lead
summary: Build instant rapport by mirroring energy and body language before gently leading the tone of the conversation.

author: Robert Cialdini
name: The 'Because' Principle
summary: Adding a reason (any reason) to a request dramatically increases compliance — people just need to hear the word 'because'.
steps: Let the listener fill in approval
